chunks.text: EECS Undergraduate Newsletter | February 21, 2025 - EECS at Berkeley. This newsletter provides updates and information for undergraduate students in the EECS department at UC Berkeley. It includes announcements, events, and opportunities relevant to the academic and professional development of students.

The newsletter covers various categories such as news, events, and faculty positions. It aims to keep students informed about important deadlines, research opportunities, and departmental activities. Students are encouraged to regularly check for new content to stay updated.

Open Faculty Positions are highlighted in this issue, indicating opportunities for new hires in the EECS department. This may involve roles in teaching, research, or both, contributing to the department's growth and academic excellence. Interested candidates should refer to the provided links for application details.
